name: Justyna E Butler, Colorado Elopement Photographer

reviews.text: Justyna is a fantastic photographer! My new husband and I booked her for both our engagement shoot and our wedding day. We are not usually very comfortable in front of a camera, but Justyna has such a warm personality that helped us both relax. On our wedding day, she helped keep us grounded whenever we felt stressed, while staying well organized and on time. Most importantly though, all our photos so far are absolutely stunning! She has an amazing eye, especially with lighting. We wanted our photos to feel adventurous and fantastical and she captured that beautifully. She would encourage us to laugh, cry, cuddle, run, or dance, and as a result all our pictures reflect our personalities and feelings perfectly. Choosing Justyna as our photographer was one of the best decisions we made for our day!

Justyna was our photographer for our engagement shoot (Sep. 2017) and our wedding (June 2018). She is the sweetest soul and so knowledgable about intimate shoots with beautiful lighting!! She walked us through the process completely!

It is so clear that Justyna LOVES love and adventure. We cannot brag about her or recommend her enough. She has such a wide range!

We used her again for a family photo shoot as well in 2021 and these photos are just as beautiful as all the others!

Justyna is truly exceptional. We booked her to photograph our wedding in the summer of 2023. Not only is she a phenomenal photographer who captured the most beautiful moments, but she's also an incredible person. When I called her, so stressed, and crying about planning our elopement, she listened patiently and invited me to sit down with her the very next day. There, she helped me create a detailed timeline, recommended amazing vendors, and offered invaluable advice for our big day.

Both of our shoots were amazing! For the shoot we did at the barn, despite not knowing a lot about horses, Justyna was SO game to work with us and our horses to get some of the most stunning pictures! Our elopement day was perfect. Justyna has a gift for making you forget you're taking pictures! She seemed to disappear into the background, allowing us to enjoy each moment to its fullest. That is a day we will never forget, and to see all of the emotion, love, and feeling reflected back in our photos means the world.

Thank you, Justyna, for making this experience so much more than we ever imagined. You're not just a photographer; you're a partner in creating unforgettable adventures and memories!

From the moment Justyna reached out to us, we were excited to meet her. She is an amazing photographer and person. She not only takes amazing photos and captures so much detail and she gets to know you. This was our first photo session together, so we had no idea how to pose or what to do. Justyna always knew what pose to do and how to talk to us in between photos to get that perfect shot. By the end of the photo shoot you met a good friend. My wife and I felt so comfortable taking photos when we were around hundreds of people. I look forward doing another shoot for our 1 year anniversary. Thank you again Justyna! You are amazing and a blessing to us!!!!

We booked Justyna for our engagement photos in 2018 and wedding in 2019 and could not recommend her enough! We wanted a photographer who could capture our shared love for adventure, of the mountains, and whose photos didn’t feel stiff, and the moment we found her website we knew she was the photographer for us. Justyna met us in RMNP at 4am before sunrise full of energy. She is super friendly and makes you feel comfortable being photographed. It is obvious she is passionate about capturing love and bringing her couples visions to life. We love love love our photos so much!!
